page: Microsoft Azure M176-88bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor with 44 physical cores and 88 vCPUs operating at a clock speed of 4.0 GHz. The processor includes a 105 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512) and Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for accelerated mathematical and matrix operations.

This server is equipped with 1536.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 17.45 GB per core. It does not include local storage, relying instead on external block storage with Premium Storage capabilities. In benchmark testing, the server demonstrates top-tier memory bandwidth, reaching 420.52 GB/sec for large-block read operations and 181.86 GB/sec for write operations. Multi-core performance is strong, as evidenced by a Passmark CPU score of 93806.76 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 20629.0.

Given its substantial memory capacity and high-frequency dedicated Intel processor, the M176-88bs_v3 is highly efficient for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. It achieves top-tier performance in database operations and static web serving throughput. The inclusion of AMX and AVX-512 instructions also makes it capable of handling medium-scale LLM inference tasks without dedicated GPU hardware, offering a resource-dense alternative for memory-bound applications, database hosting, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Microsoft Azure M176-88bs_v3 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server from the MBSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on Microsoft Hyper-V. It is equipped with a dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor featuring 44 physical cores, 88 vCPUs clocked at 4.0 GHz, and a 105 MB L3 cache. The system provides 1536.0 GB of RAM, resulting in a high resource density of 17.45 GB per vCPU, though it lacks local storage. Performance benchmarks highlight top-tier memory bandwidth, with large-block reads reaching 420.52 GB/sec, alongside strong multi-core CPU capabilities. This hardware profile is optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, including large-scale database operations, static web serving, and CPU-based machine learning inference utilizing built-in Advanced Matrix Extensions.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M176-88bs_v3 is a memory-optimized server featuring 88 vCPUs, 1536 GB RAM, and a 4.0 GHz Intel Xeon processor, delivering top-tier memory bandwidth and database performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M176-88bs_v3 is a memory-optimized server with 88 vCPUs, 1.5 TB RAM, and a 4.0 GHz Intel Xeon CPU for high-performance database workloads.
tagline: A high-frequency, memory-dense virtual server designed for demanding database operations, large-scale web serving, and vector-accelerated workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8473C processor with 44 physical cores, 88 vCPUs, and a 4.0 GHz clock speed
1536.0 GB of RAM providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 17.45 GB per vCPU
Top-tier memory bandwidth reaching 420.52 GB/sec for large-block read operations
Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) and AVX-512 support for accelerated CPU-based inference
Optimized for large-scale database hosting, static web serving, and memory-intensive enterprise applications
